# Let Me Tell You a Story — 25 Letters

> A collection of letters written by candlelight, on leadership, humanity, and the quiet work of being human. Read one a night.

- Author: Ali Al Mokdad — humanitarian leader and author (also Quantum Humanitarian)
- Work: 25 Letters (web edition, English, free to read)
- Site: https://letmetellyouastory.org/
- Author entity: https://letmetellyouastory.org/about/ · https://quantumhumanitarian.ink/ · https://alialmokdad.com/

## Preferred citation
Ali Al Mokdad, "<Letter title>," in *25 Letters* (Let Me Tell You a Story, 2026), https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/<slug>/

## The letters
- The Light That Travels: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/the-light-that-travels/
- On Friendship: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-friendship/
- On Tired Hearts: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-tired-hearts/
- On the North Star: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-the-north-star/
- On Discipline: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-discipline/
- On Reflection: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-reflection/
- On Worth: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-worth/
- On Resilience: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-resilience/
- On Daily Habits: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-daily-habits/
- On Listening: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-listening/
- On Responsibility: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-responsibility/
- On Patience: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-patience/
- On Imposter Syndrome: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-imposter-syndrome/
- On Optimism: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-optimism/
- On Strategy and Passion: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-strategy-and-passion/
- On Insults: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-insults/
- On Belonging: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-belonging/
- On Home: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-home/
- On People and the System: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-people-and-the-system/
- On Trust: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-trust/
- On the Formula for Success: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-the-formula-for-success/
- On Excellence: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-excellence/
- On Joy: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-joy/
- On Failing: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-failing/
- On Being Lonely: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-being-lonely/
- On Grief and Loss: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-grief-and-loss/
- On Greed: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-greed/
- On Work-Life Harmony: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-work-life-harmony/
- On Time: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-time/
- On Working Together: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-working-together/
- On Accountability: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-accountability/
- From 0 to 2: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/from-0-to-2/
- On Being an Everyday Humanitarian: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-being-an-everyday-humanitarian/
- On Dreams and Peace: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/on-dreams-and-peace/
- The Candle Has Gone Out: https://letmetellyouastory.org/letters/the-candle-has-gone-out/
